# VLA-Tracker

> Benchmark tracking for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) robot models

VLA-Tracker is an open-source project that tracks 82 VLA models across 8 benchmarks (LIBERO, CALVIN, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, RLBench, RoboCasa, Meta-World, Real-World). It provides structured, machine-readable data on model architectures, benchmark scores, training details, and AI-generated paper reviews.

## Key Data

- 82 models tracked (2023–2026)
- 8 benchmarks with normalized scores
- 70 AI-generated paper reviews (26 PDF-verified)
- Auto-updated from arXiv weekly

## API Access

All data is available as static JSON:

- Leaderboard: https://hyeongjinkim.github.io/Vla-tracker-/leaderboard.json
- Raw YAML per model: https://github.com/HyeongjinKim/Vla-tracker-/tree/main/data/models

## Current Rankings (LIBERO Benchmark)

1. PLD — 99.0% avg (NVIDIA, Oct 2025)
2. SimpleVLA-RL — 98.8% (SJTU/PKU, Sep 2025)
3. X-VLA — 97.8% (Tsinghua/Shanghai AI Lab, Oct 2025)
4. Fast-WAM — 97.6% (Tsinghua/Galaxea, Mar 2026)
5. VLA-Thinker — 97.5% (UCF/NVIDIA, Mar 2026)

## Current Rankings (CALVIN Benchmark)

1. LingBot-VLA — 4.50 avg len (Ant Group)
2. UD-VLA — 4.50 avg len (Tsinghua)
3. DreamVLA — 4.44 avg len (Shanghai AI Lab)

## Sections

- [Dashboard](https://hyeongjinkim.github.io/Vla-tracker-/): Interactive leaderboard, compare, coverage heatmap
- [Paper Reviews](https://hyeongjinkim.github.io/Vla-tracker-/#reviews): AI-generated seminar-style reviews for 70 papers
- [Model Data](https://github.com/HyeongjinKim/Vla-tracker-/tree/main/data/models): YAML files with architecture, benchmarks, metadata
- [Full Data (llms-full.txt)](https://hyeongjinkim.github.io/Vla-tracker-/llms-full.txt): Complete model data for AI consumption
